---
title: "Chromatin Accessibility"
description: "Single-nucleus ATAC-seq from postmortem OFC (GSE256207) analyzing
  pharmacogene-proximal regulatory regions with cell-type resolution."
image: "/images/Phase 4.png"

---

## Overview

Single-nucleus ATAC-seq analysis from postmortem orbitofrontal cortex
(GSE256207, n=92) with companion snRNA-seq (GSE254569) for cell-type label
transfer. Focused on chromatin accessibility near pharmacogenomically relevant
genes and pathway-level concordance with Phase 3 DEGs.

**Note:** GSE256207 samples are different individuals from the SMRI cohort —
only pathway-level concordance is possible, not sample-level integration.

## Methods

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
